novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Zhang Rang’s faction historically included eleven other members who likely vary slightly from the ten mentioned in the novel. ZZTJ: “In the sixth month Zhang Rang and eleven other Regular Palace Attendants were enfeoffed as full marquises for their good work during the campaign against Zhang Jue.”

full_text:
Zhang Rang 張讓
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Rang (張讓)was born in Yingchuan. Most influential of the Ten Regular Attendants. Drowned himself to avoid capture. Zhang Rang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Zhang Rang lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
Return to theThree Kingdoms Encyclopediaor browse theEncyclopedia Directory.

Fact vs Fiction
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
Zhang Rang’s faction historically included eleven other members who likely vary slightly from the ten mentioned in the novel. ZZTJ: “In the sixth month Zhang Rang and eleven other Regular Palace Attendants were enfeoffed as full marquises for their good work during the campaign against Zhang Jue.”
